name: FallingStarTown: The Ghost From Past
short_description: "On the last night of the year, the dead will turn into transparent ghosts,reunite with loved ones." Lost memories, an odd festival, and the night of the meteor shower... All these elements are intricately connected. But what truth awaits Tianhai?
detailed_description:
Message from the Developer——



Hello everyone, this is NightStar, the producer of Fallingstartown.

After nearly a year of preparation, I am pleased to present the international multilingual version of this game on my birthday.

For sourcing material for this game, I have traveled on foot in many Asian towns, communicated with people from different countries, observed their lives, and listened to their thoughts.

The reason I made this game was because of a brief conversation I had with a Japanese female student.

I told the girl that I have always been fascinated by Tokyo, and I would travel to Japan in the future for material for my stories.

At that time, she looked at me with hope in her eyes and said,

"Really? Only Tokyo? Will you come to my hometown?"

The love for her hometown in the girl's eyes at that time still remains fresh in my memory today.

The world is changing rapidly, and people are exhaustedly adapting to change.

However, there are always some forgotten corners in this world, where people are not changed by the world, they are nurturing selfless love in tranquility, continuously bringing warmth to the people around them.

I hope to record this warmth in a story, convey it to people on the other side of the world, and let everyone feel a tranquil and warm atmosphere in their busy lives.

This is the reason I bring this game to you, and I sincerely hope that you will like this "Falling Star Town".

(The English version of this work was translated by me. I do not live in an English-speaking country, but I have tried my best to restore the original meaning of the sentences and have rewritten some dialogues. If there are any problems, feel free to tell me in the comment section, and refunds are also welcomed(〃'▽'〃) )


About the Game

"On the last night of the year,
the dead will turn into transparent ghosts,
reunite with loved ones."



In a small town in the countryside, such a legend has been passed down since ancient times. Every year on December 31st,
the town celebrates the local custom, the Snow Curtain Festival.

In order to witness a meteor shower that only occurs once every decade or so, a 17-year-old art student named Tianhai returns to his hometown on the day of the Snow Curtain Festival.

However, on the night of the festival, a mysterious letter arrives in Tianhai's hands.

"Come to the school building after eight o'clock tonight. The past concealed by the meteors awaits you here."

Lost memories, an odd festival, and the night of the meteor shower...
Somehow, all these elements are intricately connected. But what truth awaits Tianhai?

In this game, players will step into the shoes of high school student Tianhai,
running around the small town on the night of the Snow Curtain Festival,
to uncover the truth behind his lost memories.

This narrative-driven exploration RPG includes a complete first chapter of the main storyline,
as well as the achievements of exploring 12 subplot stories.
